    before_action :find_account
    before_action :find_account_user
    before_action :set_current_user_scope
    before_action :restrict_draft_account_access
    before_action :check_permissions
    before_action :set_account_switcher_accounts_props
    around_action :set_time_zone

    layout "account_center"

  private

    def set_account_switcher_accounts_props
      @account_switcher_accounts_props = current_user.accounts.by_display_name.map do |account|
        Accounts::AccountSwitcher::AccountPresenter.new(account).to_hash
      end
    end

    def find_account
      @account = current_account_scope.find_by!(uid: params[:account_id])
    end

    def find_account_user
      @account_user = current_user.account_users.where(account: @account).first
    end

    def reject_team_access
      redirect_back(
        fallback_location: account_campaigns_url(@account),
        notice: "You do not have this access."
      )
    end

    def restrict_draft_account_access
      return unless @account.draft?

      redirect_back(
        fallback_location: accounts_list_url,
        notice: "Account access restricted until application has been approved."
      )
    end

    def set_current_user_scope
      @current_user_scope = @account_user&.scope ||
                            NullScope.new(account: @account)
    end

    def check_permissions
      return if permission?

      reject_access
    end

    def permission?
      return true if current_user.anedot_staff?

      access = @account_user.permission_list.access
      access.to_h[self.class::PERMISSION_MAP.fetch(action_name.to_sym).to_sym]
    end

    def reject_access
      redirect_back(
        fallback_location: accounts_list_url,
        notice: "You do not have this access"
      )
    end

    def set_time_zone(&)
      Time.use_zone(@account.time_zone, &)
    end
  end
end

module Api
  module Org
    module V3
      # v3 api endpoints for accounts
      class AccountsController < BaseController
        prepend_before_action :set_draft_account, only: %i[create]
        skip_before_action :set_account, only: %i[create]

        def show
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @account]

          serialize_obj(@account, view: :extended)
        end

        def create
          authorize %i[api org v3 account]

          if @account.update(account_params)
            current_user.make_access!(@account, :superadmin)

            serialize_obj(@account, status: :created, view: :extended)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(@account)
          end
        end

        def update
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @account]

          if signature_501c4?
            account_params.merge!(
              signed_at_501c4: Time.zone.now,
              signed_by_501c4: current_user
            )
          end
          account_params.merge!(signatory: current_user) if signature?

          if @account.update(account_params)
            serialize_obj(@account, view: :extended)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(@account)
          end
        end

        def pause
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @account]

          @account.paused!

          head :no_content
        end

        def unpause
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @account]

          return head :forbidden unless @account.paused?

          @account.active!
          if @account.paypal_merchant.blank?
            Paypal::OnboardAccountWorker.perform_async(@account.id, current_user.uid)
          end

          head :no_content
        end

        def submit
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @account]

          if @account.update(status: :pending)
            serialize_obj(@account, view: :extended)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(@account)
          end
        end

      private

        def set_account
          @account = current_account_scope.not_deleted.find_by!(uid: params[:id])
        end

        def set_draft_account
          if (signup_token = params[:signup_token])
            @partner = Account.active.find_by!(uid: signup_token)
          end

          scope = Account.draft.not_deleted.where(user: current_user)
          @account = scope.find_by(name: params[:name]) || scope.new(partner: @partner)
        end

        def signature?
          account_params[:signature].present?
        end

        def signature_501c4?
          account_params[:signature501c4].present?
        end

        def account_params
          @account_params ||= if @account&.active?
                                active_account_params
                              else
                                draft_account_params
                              end
        end

        def active_account_params
          params.require(params_wrapper).permit(
            *ACTIVE_PERMITTED_PARAMS.map(&:underscore)
          )
        end

        def draft_account_params
          params.require(params_wrapper).permit(
            *ACTIVE_PERMITTED_PARAMS.map(&:underscore),
            *DRAFT_PERMITTED_PARAMS.map(&:underscore)
          )
        end

        # possibly add: avatar, previousVendor, religious, removeAvatar, type
        ACTIVE_PERMITTED_PARAMS = %w[
          disclaimer
          displayName
          district
          email
          expectedVolume
          facebook
          favIconId
          imageId
          instagram
          minimumDonationAmount
          nextElectionDate
          phone
          publicAddressId
          slug
          timeZone
          twitter
          url
        ].freeze

        # possibly add: autoDisbursementFrequency, partnerId
        DRAFT_PERMITTED_PARAMS = %w[
          category
          description
          displayName
          electionDate
          entityType
          establishedDate
          name
          politicalParty
          purpose
          religious
          signature
          signature501c4
          softDescriptor
          subCategory
          subCategoryType
          subPurpose
          taxid
          title501c4
        ].freeze

        wrap_parameters params_wrapper, include: ACTIVE_PERMITTED_PARAMS + DRAFT_PERMITTED_PARAMS
      end
    end
  end
end

module Accounts
  # Manage entry export configurations
  class EntryExportConfigurationsController < BaseController
    PERMISSION_MAP = {
      create: :transactions_export,
      destroy: :transactions_export,
      edit: :transactions_export,
      index: :transactions_export,
      new: :transactions_export,
      update: :transactions_export
    }.freeze

    before_action :find_configuration, only: %i[edit update destroy]

    def index
      @configurations = @account.entry_export_configurations
    end

    def new
      @configuration = EntryExportConfiguration.default(account: @account)
      set_categories
    end

    def edit
      set_categories
    end

    def create
      @configuration =
        @account.entry_export_configurations.build(permitted_params)

      if @configuration.save
        redirect_to_index("Configuration successfully created.")
      else
        set_categories
        render "new"
      end
    end

    def update
      if @configuration.update(permitted_params)
        redirect_to_index("Configuration successfully updated.")
      else
        set_categories
        render "edit"
      end
    end

    def destroy
      @configuration.destroy!
      redirect_to_index("Configuration successfully deleted.")
    end

  private

    def find_configuration
      @configuration = @account.entry_export_configurations.find_by(
        id: params[:id]
      )
    end

    def permitted_params
      params.require(:entry_export_configuration).permit(
        :name,
        categories: %i[fixed_value name type],
        header_map: {}
      )
    end

    def redirect_to_index(notice)
      redirect_to(
        account_entry_export_configurations_path(@account),
        notice:
      )
    end

    def set_categories
      @selected_categories = @configuration.categories.map(&:to_h)
      @available_categories =
        EntryExport::Categories::AVAILABLE.map(&:to_h) - @selected_categories
    end
  end
end

# Public: Allows users to view year end statements
class StatementsController < ApplicationController
  layout "account_center/users"

  def index
    respond_to do |format|
      format.html do
        redirect_params = params.slice(:account_id, :token, :user_id, :year).to_unsafe_hash
        redirect_to statements_url(format: :pdf, **redirect_params)
      end
      format.pdf do
        return head :not_found if email.blank? && phone.blank?

        pdf = StatementPdf.new(presented_donations:, donor_statement:)
        send_data pdf.render,
                  filename: "statements.pdf",
                  type: "application/pdf",
                  disposition: "inline"
      end
    end
  end

private

  def email
    statement_notification&.email
  end

  def phone
    statement_notification&.phone
  end

  def donor_statement
    year = statement_notification&.year || params[:year]&.to_i
    @donor_statement ||= DonorStatement.new(email:, year:, account:, phone:)
  end

  def presented_donations
    donor_statement.donations.filter_map do |donation|
      next if donation.tandem_fund_type? && donation.account != account

      donation_props(donation)
    end
  end

  def donation_props(donation)
    name =
      if donation.external_fund_type?
        tandem_account = donation.campaign.tandem_account
        tandem_account_name = tandem_account&.directory_name || tandem_account&.display_name
        if @account == donation.account
          "#{donation.action_page.name} via #{tandem_account_name}"
        elsif @account != donation.account
          "#{donation.action_page.name} to #{donation.account.name}"
        else
          donation.action_page.name
        end
      else
        donation.campaign.name
      end

    {
      date: donation.date,
      pageName: name,
      taxDeductibleAmount: to_currency(donation_tax_deductible_amount(donation)),
      totalAmount: to_currency(donation.statement_amount / 100.0)
    }
  end

  def donation_tax_deductible_amount(donation)
    return 0 unless non_profit(donation)

    return donation.statement_amount / 100.0 unless donation.submission&.products

    # deduct product costs from donation amount
    product_costs = donation.submission.products.sum(:value)
    return 0.0 if product_costs >= donation.statement_amount

    (donation.amount - product_costs) / 100.0
  end

  def non_profit(donation)
    donation.account.entity_type == "nonprofit_organization" && !donation.account.political?
  end

  def to_currency(num)
    ActionController::Base.helpers.number_to_currency(num)
  end

  def account
    @account ||= (statement_notification&.account || Account.find_by!(uid: params[:account_id]))
  end

  def statement_notification
    return unless params[:token]

    @statement_notification ||= StatementNotification.find_by!(token: params[:token])
  end
end

payload.message:
Your update call hits `Api::Org::V3::AccountsController#update`, which whitelists the request body through `ACTIVE_PERMITTED_PARAMS` (`app/controllers/api/org/v3/accounts_controller.rb:101-120`). That list doesn’t include `directoryName`, so Rails drops the field before the model ever sees it. Because of the `before_validation` callback (`app/models/account.rb:1023-1025`), the `directory_name` column just keeps the existing value (or mirrors `display_name` if you pass that).

To change `directoryName`, you have three options:
- Send the update through the admin API (`/admin/v3/accounts/:id`), which explicitly permits `directoryName` (`app/controllers/api/admin/v3/accounts_controller.rb:59-112`).
- Keep using the org endpoint but update `displayName`; the callback will copy it into `directory_name`.
- Extend `ACTIVE_PERMITTED_PARAMS` in the org controller to include `directoryName` if that’s appropriate for org users.

If you go with the code change, remember to add `directoryName` to the permitted list and run the relevant controller tests.
